title: Precision Typography: Mastering Line Height and Letter Spacing for UI Readability
tweet: Elevate your UI design with precise #CSSTypography! Learn how optimal line height & letter spacing dramatically improve readability and user experience. #WebFonts #UIDesign #UX
tip: For optimal readability, aim for a line-height that is 1.4 to 1.6 times your font-size for body text. Adjust letter-spacing subtly; usually, a small negative value can improve visual balance for larger display fonts, while positive values can enhance readability in all-caps text.
